purchases and sales and false and misleading press releases; (iii) "boiler room" practices involving
tail.gt: market. although we do not expect to be in a position to dictate the behavior of the market or of broker-dealers who participate in the market, management will strive within the confines of practical limitations to prevent the described patterns from being established with respect to our securities.
